name: Kite MCP Server — Zerodha Stock Trading
what_it_does: Official Zerodha Kite MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with India's largest stockbroker — fetching NSE/BSE market data, querying portfolio positions, checking order status, accessing mutual fund data, and integrating Zerodha's Kite Connect API into agent-driven investment and trading workflows for Indian markets.
use_cases: Fetching NSE and BSE stock prices from Indian market research agents
Monitoring Zerodha portfolio positions and P&L from investment tracking agents
Checking order execution status from trading management agents
Accessing mutual fund NAV and holdings from portfolio agents
Analyzing Indian market data for quantitative research agents
Building AI-assisted trading dashboards for Indian equity markets
not_for: Non-Zerodha account holders (Kite Connect requires Zerodha account)
Automated trading without Kite Connect subscription (paid API access)
best_when: An Indian retail or institutional investor with a Zerodha account needs AI agents to access market data, portfolio information, and order status for NSE/BSE markets.
avoid_when: You don't have a Zerodha account or trade non-Indian markets — use appropriate regional brokers' MCPs.

auth.notes: Kite Connect API key and access token required. OAuth 2.0 flow for user authentication. Kite Connect subscription costs ₹2000/month. Official API with proper documentation.

pricing.notes: Zerodha account free; Kite Connect API subscription ₹2000/month. Official MCP from Zerodha. Well-documented official API.

performance.rate_limits: Kite Connect: 3 requests/second; WebSocket for real-time streaming

known_agent_gotchas: Kite Connect subscription required — ₹2000/month API fee before any use
Access tokens expire daily — must implement token refresh (market hours token)
Rate limit: 3 requests/second — agents must throttle calls carefully
NEVER automate order placement without explicit human confirmation — SEBI regulations
Official Zerodha MCP in Go — highest quality Indian broker MCP available
WebSocket streaming for real-time data requires separate connection management
agent_readiness.security_notes: SEBI-regulated broker. HTTPS enforced. Official Zerodha MCP. OAuth 2.0 with daily token rotation. API key in secure storage. NEVER automate trades without human approval — regulatory requirement.

security_score_components.security_notes: SEBI regulated. HTTPS. OAuth with daily rotation. Official Zerodha. No automated trading. Secure key storage.
